name: pipeline
description: Pipeline -- converts an EA SPORTS College Football 27 dynasty's departing players into a calibrated, projected Madden NFL 26 rookie draft class -- ratings conversion, draft declaration prediction, draft projection, dev traits, combine generation, and franchise-save export.

scripts.test: node test/powerCurve.spec.js && node test/bioFields.spec.js && node test/draftClassFile.spec.js && node test/draftClassTemplate.spec.js && node test/appearanceCatalog.spec.js && node test/draftClassExporter.spec.js && node test/agilitySize.spec.js

author: ChanceDaWrapper
contributors: Sean Dwyer (seanpdwyer7) -- draft projection, declaration prediction, combine generation, and export enrichment adapted from cfb2madden; see NOTICE.md
